public_reputation: Forge-trance breaker whose rage-state made him the pattern for siege-smashers in early tower consolidation.
appearance: Quota-practical armor, work-hardened layers, and visibly maintained equipment mark function before ceremony.
manner: Treats planning, posture, and timing as parts of the same problem rather than separate concerns. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a berserker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.

current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of berserker while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep readiness, command cohesion, and physical security aligned even when politics or scarcity push against discipline. Around Soreheim Proper, that usually means carrying quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure without letting the role of berserker visibly slip.
